userStories.title: Implement Collapsible Empty Section for Dashboard Interface
acceptanceCriteria: Empty sections should automatically collapse when no content is present
Collapsed sections should have a minimal, unobtrusive indicator of availability
Users should be able to manually expand collapsed sections
Collapsing mechanism should not impact sections with existing content
Implement smooth, animated transition when collapsing/expanding
Ensure responsive design works across desktop browsers (Chrome, Safari, Firefox)
userStories.notes:
As a user, I want the ability to collapse empty sections on the dashboard to optimize screen space and improve UI cleanliness. The current interface leaves unused sections visible, which reduces dashboard efficiency and visual appeal.

The proposed enhancement will allow dynamic section collapse when no content is present, creating a more streamlined and user-friendly experience.

**Reproduction Steps:**
1. Navigate to https://www.feedbackflow.cc/dashboard
2. Identify sections with zero content
3. Verify current behavior where empty sections remain fully expanded
4. Confirm desired behavior of automatic section collapse

**Expected:** Empty sections should dynamically collapse, reducing visual clutter and optimizing dashboard space
**Actual:** Empty sections remain fully expanded, consuming unnecessary screen real estate

**Screenshot:** https://flexible-gull-167.convex.cloud/api/storage/89edcce0-5dd1-45a1-8210-70d88ad3a326
